expectations.text: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
osascript is used to detect Chrome/Meet state
expectations.evidence: detectMeetCall() calls execSync('osascript -e ...') checking all Chrome tabs for 'meet.google.com'

expectations.text: Three separate button indices are used for mic, camera, and hang up
expectations.evidence: BTN = { MIC: 0, CAMERA: 1, HANGUP: 2 } defined at lines 10-14, each handled separately

expectations.text: Button rendering uses sharp to produce raw RGB buffers
setInterval polling is present to continuously update button state
expectations.evidence: const pollInterval = setInterval(() => poll(deck), 2000) at line 278

expectations.text: deck.on('down') handler is present for button presses
Different colors/icons used for active vs inactive (in-call vs not-in-call) states
expectations.evidence: renderButton() uses dimmed:true (opacity 0.25, grey bg) when not inCall; green '#1a7a1a' / red '#b22222' with different icons (🎤 vs 🔇, 📷 vs 🚫) when inCall
